rejection_reason: compliance: email_subject_max_chars — subject line is 74 characters, exceeding the 50-character maximum. Long subject lines are clipped in most email clients and reduce open rates. Trim to under 50 characters.
text:
Subject: {{first_name}}, a quick thought on how FlowAI can help {{company}} save time and close more deals this quarter

Hey {{first_name}},

I noticed {{company}} recently scaled the sales team — that usually means rep ramp time becomes a real challenge.

FlowAI saves sales reps an average of 2 hours per day by automating the admin work that slows them down.

Worth a 15-minute call?

[Signature]

FlowAI · 123 Main St, San Francisco CA 94105 · Unsubscribe
